login.title: Log in
login.verificationComplete2: Get ready to enjoy everything NovaGames has to offer!

signUp.title: Sign Up
signUp.policy: By continuing, you accept our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

username.pattern: Can only contain letters, numbers, and spaces

email.format: Must be a valid email format

password.length: Must be at least 8 characters long
password.pattern: Must include at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character

alert.title: Registration completed successfully
alert.text: Check your email to verify your account
alert.emailAlreadyExists: An account with that email address already exists
